data.content: This is an MSTest project targeting .NET 8. I'll start `dotnet watch test` which will automatically rerun your tests whenever you save a file change.

toolRequests.name: bash

arguments.description: Start dotnet watch test for hot reload

toolRequests.intentionSummary: Start dotnet watch test for hot reload

data.reasoningText:
The user has a .NET test project with MSTest. They want hot reload to iterate on tests. In .NET, `dotnet watch test` provides this - it watches for file changes and reruns tests automatically.

Let me start `dotnet watch test` for them in async mode so they can iterate.

arguments.description: Start dotnet watch test for hot reload

toolCalls.name: bash
toolCalls.args: {"command": "cd /tmp/sv-d0bbdf6aac3f4dd8b5a7b4c2df818cd4 && dotnet watch test --no-hot-reload", "description": "Start dotnet watch test for hot reload", "mode": "async", "shellId": "dotnet-watch"}
